Sistema multi-tenant para gestión empresarial con arquitectura profesional.

## Overview
CoreBiz is a sophisticated multi-tenant ERP solution designed for SMEs. It offers modular components for accounting, human resources, and customer relationship management, all accessible through a unified, high-performance web interface that adapts to the specific needs of each tenant.

## Technical Challenges
Implementing a secure multi-tenant architecture was critical. I used row-level security in the database and a dynamic tenant-resolution middleware in the Express backend to ensure complete data isolation. Optimizing the Astro frontend for large data tables also required custom virtualization components to maintain a smooth user experience.

## Results & Impact
Successfully onboarded 15 pilot clients within the first month. The system's modularity allows for rapid feature deployment, and the multi-tenant approach has significantly reduced infrastructure costs per customer while providing a premium, enterprise-grade experience.
Infraestructura tecnológica completa para CROBF incluyendo correos institucionales y sistemas internos.

## Overview
The backbone of CROBF's digital presence, this project involved architecting a scalable cloud infrastructure to host institutional websites, private mail servers, and internal automation tools. It serves as the foundation for all organizational communications and digital assets.

## Technical Challenges
The main challenge was ensuring high availability for the mail server while maintaining strict security protocols (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) to prevent spoofing and ensure high deliverability. I also automated the deployment pipeline using GitHub Actions to ensure zero-downtime updates for the main website and associated microservices.

## Results & Impact
Achieved 99.9% uptime over the last year. The institutional communication has been streamlined, and the automated CI/CD pipelines have reduced deployment errors by 75%, allowing the team to focus on core development rather than infrastructure maintenance.
Aplicación nativa de Android desarrollada en Kotlin para plataforma de comercio electrónico con carrito de compras.

## Overview
A high-performance native Android application for a retail platform. It features a seamless shopping experience with real-time inventory updates, integrated payment gateways, and personalized user profiles, all following modern Material Design principles.

## Technical Challenges
Synchronizing local state with the remote server in offline-first scenarios was complex. I utilized Kotlin Coroutines and the Room persistence library to create a robust sync engine. Ensuring smooth UI transitions and 60fps scrolling with large image catalogs required deep optimization of RecyclerView and custom image loading strategies.

## Results & Impact
The app maintained a 4.8-star rating on the Play Store during its initial launch. User engagement increased by 40% compared to the mobile web version, and mobile sales now account for 60% of the total platform revenue, significantly driving overall business growth.
Herramienta avanzada para recolección y procesamiento de estadísticas de productividad desde la API de GitHub.

## Overview
A robust data harvesting tool designed to aggregate and normalize contribution data from multiple GitHub organizations. It provides a centralized dashboard for tracking developer velocity, pull request cycles, and repository health across large-scale ecosystems.

## Technical Challenges
Handling GitHub API rate limits was a primary hurdle. I implemented a sophisticated queuing system with exponential backoff and localized caching using Redis to minimize redundant API calls. Data normalization across different repository structures also required a flexible, version-tolerant schema.

## Results & Impact
Reduced the time spent on manual reporting by 90%. The engine now processes over 1,000 events daily, providing stakeholders with real-time insights into team performance and project bottlenecks, which has led to a measurable improvement in sprint planning accuracy.
Sistema de punto de venta web para gestión de ventas, inventario y reportes en tiempo real.

## Overview
A modern, cloud-native Point of Sale system designed for fast-paced retail environments. It provides real-time sales tracking, inventory management, and detailed financial reporting across multiple locations, all through a responsive web interface.

## Technical Challenges
Real-time synchronization across multiple terminals was achieved using a combination of WebSockets and Turso's distributed database. Handling edge cases like concurrent transactions on the same SKU during peak hours required implementing optimistic concurrency control and a robust conflict resolution strategy.

## Results & Impact
The system currently handles hundreds of transactions daily with sub-second latency. The real-time reporting module has empowered managers to make data-driven inventory decisions, reducing waste by 20% and improving overall stock turnover rates.
Sistema de gestión para tienda de ropa. Desarrollo de una app intuitiva para reemplazar el control manual de stock.

## Overview
A custom-built management system tailored for the specific needs of a local clothing boutique. It replaced a fragmented manual tracking system with a centralized digital hub for inventory, sales, and customer data, optimized for the store's unique workflow.

## Technical Challenges
The client needed an extremely intuitive interface for non-technical staff. I focused on a minimalist UI/UX design using Flask and custom CSS. Migrating years of handwritten records into a structured SQLite database required building a specialized data entry and validation tool to ensure historical data integrity.

## Results & Impact
Completely eliminated stock discrepancies that previously accounted for a 5% loss in annual revenue. The time required for end-of-day reconciliation was reduced from 2 hours to just 15 minutes, significantly improving operational efficiency and allowing the owner to focus on growth.
